description: A vegetable grower wants to dispatch an autonomous robotic weeder to a field.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the boundary map for the field to be weeded.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets the correct field boundary.

nodes.task_description: Generate a path plan for the robot to efficiently cover the entire field.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates an optimized path for the robot to follow.

nodes.task_description: Send the mission plan to the robotic weeder and command it to start.
